default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Reconnect between GrowthX and Tavus to discuss potential collaboration and Tavus's upcoming product launch.](https://fathom.video/share/jy7mDtsFVyxPf33b2dR9zz3wAQasiLD4?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Tavus is launching a new multimodal AI human product on October 28th, allowing users to create customizable AI agents for various use cases](https://fathom.video/share/jy7mDtsFVyxPf33b2dR9zz3wAQasiLD4?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
  - [GrowthX showcased their content generation capabilities and successful case studies with other AI companies](https://fathom.video/share/jy7mDtsFVyxPf33b2dR9zz3wAQasiLD4?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
  - [Both parties expressed strong interest in collaboration, with next steps focused on finalizing the contract for a strategy sprint](https://fathom.video/share/jy7mDtsFVyxPf33b2dR9zz3wAQasiLD4?tab=summary&timestamp=1717.0)

## Topics

### Tavus Product Update

  - [Launching new "V2" product on October 28th](https://fathom.video/share/jy7mDtsFVyxPf33b2dR9zz3wAQasiLD4?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
  - [Users can create multimodal AI humans for various use cases (e.g., companions, executive assistants)](https://fathom.video/share/jy7mDtsFVyxPf33b2dR9zz3wAQasiLD4?tab=summary&timestamp=169.0)
  - [Interaction via SMS, FaceTime, and phone calls](https://fathom.video/share/jy7mDtsFVyxPf33b2dR9zz3wAQasiLD4?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [Focusing on product-led growth while maintaining enterprise offerings](https://fathom.video/share/jy7mDtsFVyxPf33b2dR9zz3wAQasiLD4?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
  - [Undergoing rebranding with new logo, color scheme, and website](https://fathom.video/share/jy7mDtsFVyxPf33b2dR9zz3wAQasiLD4?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)

### Tavus Team Changes

  - [Product marketing departure, growth team working closer with core marketing](https://fathom.video/share/jy7mDtsFVyxPf33b2dR9zz3wAQasiLD4?tab=summary&timestamp=254.0)
  - [BD team now under growth, with plans to hire more reps](https://fathom.video/share/jy7mDtsFVyxPf33b2dR9zz3wAQasiLD4?tab=summary&timestamp=273.0)
  - [Open positions: RevOps lead, growth engineer, GTM eng, growth marketer](https://fathom.video/share/jy7mDtsFVyxPf33b2dR9zz3wAQasiLD4?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)

### GrowthX Capabilities Showcase

  - [Demonstrated content generation for various clients (Ramp, Augment Code, Webflow)](https://fathom.video/share/jy7mDtsFVyxPf33b2dR9zz3wAQasiLD4?tab=summary&timestamp=723.0)
  - [Highlighted agentic workflows, image generation, and coding assistance](https://fathom.video/share/jy7mDtsFVyxPf33b2dR9zz3wAQasiLD4?tab=summary&timestamp=951.0)
  - [Emphasized the importance of interactive experiences for user engagement and SEO success](https://fathom.video/share/jy7mDtsFVyxPf33b2dR9zz3wAQasiLD4?tab=summary&timestamp=1290.0)

### Collaboration Potential

  - [GrowthX expressed strong interest in exploring video-related opportunities with Tavus](https://fathom.video/share/jy7mDtsFVyxPf33b2dR9zz3wAQasiLD4?tab=summary&timestamp=307.0)
  - [Discussed the success of companies like Eleven Labs in balancing consumer and enterprise offerings](https://fathom.video/share/jy7mDtsFVyxPf33b2dR9zz3wAQasiLD4?tab=summary&timestamp=505.0)
  - [Marcel shared insights on successful content strategies and SEO performance](https://fathom.video/share/jy7mDtsFVyxPf33b2dR9zz3wAQasiLD4?tab=summary&timestamp=578.0)

### Contract Discussion

  - [Reviewed existing Statement of Work (SoW) from PandaDoc](https://fathom.video/share/jy7mDtsFVyxPf33b2dR9zz3wAQasiLD4?tab=summary&timestamp=1761.0)
  - [Jesse expressed need for potential opt-out clause after trial period](https://fathom.video/share/jy7mDtsFVyxPf33b2dR9zz3wAQasiLD4?tab=summary&timestamp=1800.0)
  - [Tyler clarified that Phase 1 (strategy sprint) is low-risk, with opt-out option by week 7](https://fathom.video/share/jy7mDtsFVyxPf33b2dR9zz3wAQasiLD4?tab=summary&timestamp=1926.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Tyler to send updated Word doc version of SoW to Jesse](https://fathom.video/share/jy7mDtsFVyxPf33b2dR9zz3wAQasiLD4?tab=summary&timestamp=1981.0)
  - [Jesse to submit SoW for internal review and aim for contract finalization by end of week](https://fathom.video/share/jy7mDtsFVyxPf33b2dR9zz3wAQasiLD4?tab=summary&timestamp=2019.0)
  - [Tentative strategy sprint kickoff date set for September 29th, pending contract signing](https://fathom.video/share/jy7mDtsFVyxPf33b2dR9zz3wAQasiLD4?tab=summary&timestamp=2004.0)
  - [GrowthX team to prepare for quick turnaround on any contract redlines](https://fathom.video/share/jy7mDtsFVyxPf33b2dR9zz3wAQasiLD4?tab=summary&timestamp=2080.0)
  - [Both parties to maintain communication for any necessary follow-up calls or clarifications](https://fathom.video/share/jy7mDtsFVyxPf33b2dR9zz3wAQasiLD4?tab=summary&timestamp=2104.0)
